extraction.one_line_summary: BUITRAGO Santiago attacked final 1.5km on Tre Cime di Lavaredo; ROGLIC Primoz took 3 seconds from THOMAS Geraint in final 200m using equipment gambit.
tactical_patterns: ROGLIC Primoz changed to mountain bike gearing (44t rear) before final climb, enabled final 200m acceleration for bonus seconds.
THOMAS Geraint attempted own late attack inside 300m but ROGLIC held wheel through COURT Magnus for bonus protection.
Breakaway allowed extended freedom with 50kph opening hour suggesting GC teams wanted controlled final climb without early attrition.
ALMEIDA Joao lost nearly minute on final slopes despite sitting on THOMAS wheel, revealing weakness at extreme gradients near 20%.

rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: proactive equipment change and tactical aggression in final 200m shows confidence before crucial mountain TT
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: neutral: defended pink but attempted desperate late counter reveals concern about 26-second margin before Monte Lussari TT
rider_signals.ALMEIDA Joao: negative: losing minute on final slopes after sitting protected position exposes vulnerability at extreme gradients
rider_signals.HEALY Ben: neutral: marked PINO Thibaut in KOM competition but caught by breakaway rider reveals aggressive tactics exhausted reserves
rider_signals.BUITRAGO Santiago: positive: caught GEE Derek with 1.5km remaining and distanced immediately, altitude native advantage decisive on 2300m finish
